collection.name: arrayMapRange
collection.description: Creates an array of the given length by mapping each index through the iteratee.
collection.typeSignature: function arrayMapRange<TResult>(length: number, iteratee: (index: number) => TResult): TResult[]

collection.name: arrayJoin
collection.description: Performs a full join between two arrays, returning entries (left-only), updates (matched), and exits (right-only).
collection.typeSignature: function arrayJoin<TLeft, TRight>(leftInput: TLeft[], rightInput: TRight[], predicate: ArrayJoinPredicate<TLeft, TRight>): ArrayJoin<TLeft, TRight>

collection.name: arrayGroup
collection.description: Groups array items by a property key or indexer function into a keyed record.
collection.typeSignature: function arrayGroup<TValue>(input: TValue[], identity: ArrayGroupIdentity<TValue>): Record<PropertyKey, TValue[]>

collection.name: arrayIntersection
collection.description: Returns items from the left array that have a matching counterpart in the right array.
collection.typeSignature: function arrayIntersection<TLeft, TRight = TLeft>(leftInput: TLeft[], rightInput: TRight[], predicate?: ArrayJoinPredicate<TLeft, TRight>): TLeft[]

collection.name: arrayDifference
collection.description: Returns items from the left array that have no matching counterpart in the right array.
collection.typeSignature: function arrayDifference<TLeft, TRight = TLeft>(leftInput: TLeft[], rightInput: TRight[], predicate?: ArrayJoinPredicate<TLeft, TRight>): TLeft[]

collection.name: objectForEach
collection.description: Iterates over the enumerable properties of an object, invoking the iteratee for each key-value pair.
collection.typeSignature: function objectForEach<TSource extends IterableObject>(input: TSource, iteratee: ObjectIteratee<keyof TSource, TSource[keyof TSource]>): void

collection.name: objectMap
collection.description: Maps over the enumerable properties of an object, producing a new object with transformed values.
collection.typeSignature: function objectMap<TSource extends IterableObject, TResult extends Record<keyof TSource, unknown> = Record<keyof TSource, unknown>>(input: TSource, iteratee: ObjectIteratee<Extract<keyof TSource, string>, TSource[keyof TSource], unknown>): TResult

params.name: iteratee
params.type: ObjectIteratee<Extract<keyof TSource, string>, TSource[keyof TSource], unknown>

collection.name: objectReduce
collection.description: Reduces the enumerable properties of an object into a single accumulated value.
collection.typeSignature: function objectReduce<TSource extends IterableObject, TResult>(input: TSource, reducer: ObjectReducer<keyof TSource, TSource[keyof TSource], TResult>, initial: TResult): TResult

collection.name: setForEach
collection.description: Iterates over each value in a `Set`, invoking the iteratee with the value and a running index.
collection.typeSignature: function setForEach<TValue>(input: Set<TValue>, iteratee: CollectionIteratee<TValue>): void

collection.name: setMap
collection.description: Maps over a `Set`, producing a new `Set` with each value transformed by the iteratee.
collection.typeSignature: function setMap<TValue, TResult>(input: Set<TValue>, iteratee: CollectionIteratee<TValue, TResult>): Set<TResult>

collection.name: setFilter
collection.description: Filters a `Set`, returning a new `Set` containing only values that satisfy the predicate.
collection.typeSignature: function setFilter<TValue>(input: Set<TValue>, predicate: CollectionIteratee<TValue, boolean>): Set<TValue>

collection.name: setFind
collection.description: Searches a `Set` for the first value that satisfies the predicate.
collection.typeSignature: function setFind<TValue>(input: Set<TValue>, predicate: CollectionIteratee<TValue, boolean>): TValue | undefined

collection.name: setFlatMap
collection.description: Flat-maps over a `Set`, concatenating the arrays returned by the iteratee into a new `Set`.
collection.typeSignature: function setFlatMap<TValue, TResult>(input: Set<TValue>, iteratee: CollectionIteratee<TValue, TResult[]>): Set<TResult>

collection.name: IterableObject
collection.description: An object whose values are unknown, suitable for generic iteration.
collection.typeSignature: type IterableObject = Record<PropertyKey, unknown>;

collection.name: CollectionIteratee
collection.description: Callback invoked for each item in a collection, receiving the value and its index.
collection.typeSignature: type CollectionIteratee<TValue, TResult = void> = (value: TValue, index: number) => TResult;

collection.name: ObjectIteratee
collection.description: Callback invoked for each entry in an object, receiving the key and value.
collection.typeSignature: type ObjectIteratee<TKey, TValue, TResult = void> = (key: TKey, value: TValue) => TResult;

collection.name: ObjectReducer
collection.description: Reducer callback for folding over object entries into an accumulated result.
collection.typeSignature: type ObjectReducer<TKey, TValue, TResult = void> = (accumulator: TResult, key: TKey, value: TValue) => TResult;

collection.name: ArrayGroupIdentity
collection.description: A property key or indexer function used to derive group identity from array items.
collection.typeSignature: type ArrayGroupIdentity<TValue> = keyof TValue | Indexer<TValue>;

collection.name: ArrayJoinPredicate
collection.description: A shared key or predicate function used to match items between two arrays in a join.
collection.typeSignature: type ArrayJoinPredicate<TLeft, TRight> = keyof (TLeft & TRight) | Predicate<TLeft, TRight>;

collection.name: ArrayJoin
collection.description: Result of an array join containing unmatched left items, matched pairs, and unmatched right items.

comparitors.name: comparitorNumeric
comparitors.description: Numeric comparator suitable for sorting numbers in ascending order.
comparitors.typeSignature: function comparitorNumeric(valueA: number, valueB: number): number

comparitors.name: comparitorDate
comparitors.description: Date comparator suitable for sorting dates in ascending chronological order.
comparitors.typeSignature: function comparitorDate(valueA: Date, valueB: Date): number

comparitors.name: comparitorString
comparitors.description: Locale-aware string comparator suitable for alphabetical sorting.
comparitors.typeSignature: function comparitorString(valueA: string, valueB: string): number

dom.name: onDOMEvent
dom.description: Attaches a strongly-typed event listener to a DOM element and returns a disposable for cleanup.
dom.typeSignature: function onDOMEvent<TElement extends EventTarget, TEvent extends string & keyof DOMElementEventMap<TElement>>(element: TElement, event: TEvent, handler: DOMEventHandler<TElement, TEvent>): Disposable

dom.name: onDOMElementResize
dom.description: Observes an element for size changes using `ResizeObserver` (with a `window.resize` fallback) and returns a disposable.
dom.typeSignature: function onDOMElementResize(element: HTMLElement, handler: DOMElementResizeHandler): Disposable

dom.name: DOMEventHandler
dom.description: A strongly-typed DOM event handler bound to a specific element and event type.
dom.typeSignature: type DOMEventHandler<TElement, TEvent extends keyof DOMElementEventMap<TElement>> = (this: TElement, event: DOMElementEventMap<TElement>[TEvent]) => void;

dom.name: DOMElementResizeHandler
dom.description: Callback invoked when an observed element is resized.

dom.name: DOMElementEventMap
dom.description: Resolves the correct event map for a given DOM element type.
dom.typeSignature:
type DOMElementEventMap<TElement> = TElement extends MediaQueryList ? MediaQueryListEventMap
    : TElement extends HTMLElement ? HTMLElementEventMap
        : TElement extends Window ? WindowEventMap
            : TElement extends Document ? DocumentEventMap
                : Record<string, Event>;

dom.name: DOMElementResizeEvent
dom.description: Simplified resize event containing the new dimensions of the observed element.

dom.name: hasWindow
dom.description: Whether the current environment has a `window` object (i.e. is a browser context).

function.name: functionIdentity
function.description: Returns the value it receives unchanged — useful as a default transform or placeholder.

function.name: functionProduce
function.description: Wraps a value or factory function into a consistent factory that always returns the value.

function.name: functionCache
function.description: Wraps a function so its result is computed once and then returned from cache on subsequent calls until `invalidate()` is called.
function.typeSignature: function functionCache<TValue extends AnyFunction>(value: TValue): CachedFunction<TValue>

function.name: functionMemoize
function.description: Memoizes a function by caching results keyed by the resolver (defaults to the first argument).
function.typeSignature: function functionMemoize<TValue extends AnyFunction, TKey = Parameters<TValue>[0]>(value: TValue, resolver: MemoizeResolver<TValue, TKey> = (...args) => args[0])

function.name: CachedFunction
function.description: A function wrapper that caches its result after the first invocation until explicitly invalidated.

function.name: MemoizedFunction
function.description: A function wrapper that caches results per unique key, exposing the underlying cache `Map`.

function.name: MemoizeResolver
function.description: Derives a cache key from the arguments of a memoized function.
function.typeSignature: type MemoizeResolver<TValue extends AnyFunction, TKey> = (...args: Parameters<TValue>) => TKey;

number.name: numberSum
number.description: Computes the sum of an array of numbers, or of values mapped through an optional iteratee.
number.typeSignature: function numberSum<TValue = number>(values: TValue[], iteratee?: (value: TValue) => number)

number.name: numberGCD
number.description: Computes the greatest common divisor of two integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

number.name: numberNice
number.description: Rounds a value to a "nice" human-readable number (1, 2, 5, or 10 scaled by the appropriate power of ten).
number.typeSignature: function numberNice(value: number, round: boolean = false)

object.name: objectFreeze
object.description: Creates a shallow frozen copy of the given object.

predicate.name: predicateIdentity
predicate.description: Tests strict reference equality between two values.
predicate.typeSignature: function predicateIdentity(valueA: unknown, valueB: unknown): boolean

predicate.name: predicateKey
predicate.description: Tests whether two objects share the same value at a given key.
predicate.typeSignature: function predicateKey<TValue extends Record<PropertyKey, unknown>>(valueA: TValue, valueB: TValue, key: PropertyKey): boolean

string.name: stringUniqueId
string.description: Generates a cryptographically random hexadecimal string of the specified length.

type.name: typeIsArray
type.description: Checks whether a value is an array.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsArray(value: unknown): value is unknown[]

type.name: typeIsDate
type.description: Checks whether a value is a `Date` instance.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsDate(value: unknown): value is Date

type.name: typeIsObject
type.description: Checks whether a value is a non-null object.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsObject(value: unknown): value is object

type.name: typeIsBoolean
type.description: Checks whether a value is a boolean.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsBoolean(value: unknown): value is boolean

type.name: typeIsFunction
type.description: Checks whether a value is a function.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsFunction(value: unknown): value is AnyFunction

type.name: typeIsNumber
type.description: Checks whether a value is a number.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsNumber(value: unknown): value is number

type.name: typeIsString
type.description: Checks whether a value is a string.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsString(value: unknown): value is string

type.name: typeIsNil
type.description: Checks whether a value is `null` or `undefined`.
type.typeSignature: function typeIsNil(value: unknown): value is null | undefined

value.name: valueOneOrMore
value.description: Normalises a single value or array into a guaranteed array.

types.name: AnyObject
types.description: A loosely-typed object with string, number, or symbol keys.

types.name: AnyFunction
types.description: A loosely-typed function signature that accepts and returns anything.

types.name: OneOrMore
types.description: Represents a single value or an array of values.

types.name: Predicate
types.description: A comparison function that tests whether two values match.
types.typeSignature: type Predicate<TLeft, TRight = TLeft> = (left: TLeft, right: TRight) => boolean;

types.name: Indexer
types.description: Derives a grouping key from a value.

types.name: Merge
types.description: Merges two types, with properties in `TB` overriding those in `TA`.
types.typeSignature: type Merge<TA, TB> = Omit<TA, keyof TB> & TB;

types.name: UnionToIntersection
types.description: Converts a union type to an intersection type.
types.typeSignature: type UnionToIntersection<U> = (U extends any ? (arg: U) => any : never) extends ((arg: infer I) => void) ? I : never;

types.name: IfEquals
types.description: Conditional type that resolves to `A` if `X` and `Y` are identical, otherwise `B`.

types.name: GetReadonlyKeys
types.description: Extracts the readonly property keys from an object type.

types.name: GetMutableKeys
types.description: Extracts the mutable (non-readonly) property keys from an object type.

types.name: Disposable
types.description: A resource that can be disposed to release underlying subscriptions or handles.
